title: excoecaria agallocha var. muelleriana
intro: Excoecaria agallocha var. muelleriana, also known as the Pacific toothbrush tree, is a variety of the poisonous plant Excoecaria agallocha. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Excoecaria agallocha var. muelleriana include wound healing, pain relief, and antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make an ointment or tincture, which can be applied topically to treat various skin conditions.
